title: Proof
description: Canonical 18-field Verifiable Proof Object. Emitted by POST /v2/permits/:id/consume and fetchable via GET /v2/proofs/:id. Companion spec: atlasent-sdk/docs/V2_PILLAR9_PROOF_SYSTEM.md. STATUS: draft v2 — do not implement until v1 GA. This schema is the wire contract both SDK languages verify against; the Ed25519 signature covers the canonical JSON of the 18-field envelope below in declaration order (matching signed_bytes_for semantics established by the v1 audit bundle).

permit_id.description: The permit (decision_id from /v1-evaluate) this proof binds to.

agent.description: Agent identifier as submitted on the originating evaluate call.

action.description: Action as submitted on the originating evaluate call.

target.description: Target resource identifier (e.g. 'prod-cluster'). Empty string when the action has no discrete target.

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical JSON of the payload that flowed through the callback. Computed client-side by hashPayload() / hash_payload(); the raw payload is never sent to the server.

policy_version.description: Opaque identifier of the policy bundle version that produced the decision. Stable: a proof issued under policy_version='v3-a7f1…' remains verifiable after the policy is superseded.

decision.description: Policy decision that produced the permit.

execution_status.description: Outcome of the callback the SDK wrapped. 'pending' is reserved for proofs fetched before the consume step completes (e.g. async execution).

execution_hash.description: Optional SHA-256 hex of execution result metadata (deploy sha, output digest, etc.). Null when the caller didn't supply one.

audit_hash.description: Hash-chain entry id — the SHA-256 digest of this proof's audit_events row, the bridge between /v2/proofs and the v1 audit chain.

previous_hash.description: The audit-chain hash of the event immediately preceding this one in the org's chain. '0'*64 for the genesis entry.

chain_hash.description: Recomputable SHA-256(previous_hash || canonicalJSON(payload of this proof)). Matches audit_events.hash for the same row.

signing_key_id.description: Registry id of the Ed25519 key that produced signature. Verifiers try this key first then fall through, per rotation semantics established in v1.

signature.description: Base64url (no padding) Ed25519 signature over canonicalJSON of the 18 fields in declaration order. Empty string on signing failure — verifiers MUST treat that as invalid_signature.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the consume call that produced this proof.

consumed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the callback completed. Equal to issued_at when the consume was synchronous; may differ for async execution. Null for proofs fetched before consume.
